sigils.name: Airborne
sigils.description: This card will ignore opposing cards and strike an opponent directly.

sigils.name: Mighty Leap
sigils.description: A card bearing this sigil will block an opposing Airborne creature.

sigils.name: Waterborne
sigils.description: On the opponent's turn, creatures attacking this card's space attack directly instead.

sigils.name: Sprinter
sigils.description: At the end of the owner's turn, this card moves in the direction inscribed in the sigil.

sigils.name: Sprinter (Left)
sigils.description: At the end of the owner's turn, this card moves to the left.

sigils.name: Hefty
sigils.description: At the end of the owner's turn, this card moves in the direction inscribed, pushing other cards.

sigils.name: Hefty (Left)
sigils.description: At the end of the owner's turn, this card moves to the left, pushing other cards.

sigils.name: Bifurcated Strike
sigils.description: This card will strike each opposing space to the left and right of the space across from it.

sigils.name: Trifurcated Strike
sigils.description: This card will strike each opposing space to the left, right, and center.

sigils.name: Touch of Death
sigils.description: Any creature dealt damage by this card is instantly killed.

sigils.name: Fledgling
sigils.description: After surviving for one turn, this card grows into a stronger form.

sigils.name: Unkillable
sigils.description: When this card perishes, a copy of it returns to your hand.

sigils.name: Many Lives
sigils.description: When this card is sacrificed, it does not perish.

sigils.name: Loose Tail
sigils.description: When this card would be struck, a tail is created in its place and this card moves right.

sigils.name: Sharp Quills
sigils.description: Once struck, the striker is dealt 1 damage.

sigils.name: Burrower
sigils.description: This card will move to block an opposing creature bearing Airborne or a direct attack.

sigils.name: Stinky
sigils.description: The creature opposing this card loses 1 Power.

sigils.name: Leader
sigils.description: Creatures adjacent to this card gain 1 Power.

sigils.name: Ant Spawner
sigils.description: When this card is played, an Ant enters your hand.

sigils.name: Hive
sigils.description: When this card is struck, an Ant is created in your hand.

sigils.name: Trinket Bearer
sigils.description: When this card is played, you receive a random item.

sigils.name: Corpse Eater
sigils.description: If a creature you own dies by combat, this card is played from your hand into its space.

sigils.name: Bone King
sigils.description: When this card dies, it generates 4 Bones.

sigils.name: Scavenger
sigils.description: When a creature you do not own dies, this card generates 1 Bone.

sigils.name: Bees Within
sigils.description: When this card is struck, a Bee is created in your hand.

sigils.name: Blood Lust
sigils.description: When this card kills a creature, it gains 1 Power.

sigils.name: Double Strike
sigils.description: This card will strike the opposing space an additional time when attacking.

sigils.name: Bellist
sigils.description: When this card is played, Chimes are created on adjacent empty spaces.

sigils.name: Guardian
sigils.description: When an opposing card is played opposite an empty space, this card moves to that space.

sigils.name: Repulsive
sigils.description: Creatures will not attack this card.

sigils.name: Worthy Sacrifice
sigils.description: This card counts as three blood rather than one when sacrificed.
